params.TriggerDescription: Eminence — Whenever you attack with one or more Knights, if CARDNAME is in the command zone or on the battlefield, draw a card, then discard a card.
Eminence — Whenever you attack with one or more Knights, if CARDNAME is in the command zone or on the battlefield, draw a card, then discard a card.
Whenever CARDNAME deals combat damage to a player, return target Knight creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
